Okay, hopefully you find this as funny as I do, but I put two little butt marks for the O's and booty. I thought it was funny. Anyways, so big booty boot camp. What is big booty boot camp? Big booty boot camp is the first of many internal what I call cash plays. So you need to always have two marketing calendars going. One is your internal calendar, the other one is your external calendar. The internal calendar is what you're marketing to your existing clients. Now this is really important because the cost of acquisition is zero, which means everything you do here is profit. So think about it this way. Let's say that you could run a campaign that does $30,000, but your margin is 30%. So you only make 10 grand. It feels cool because you had $30,000 a month through revenue, but when you take home to 10 grand, T, no, you're barely subsisting with them on your EFT. You need to engage them more and sell them more services and products. Okay, so big booty boot camp is one of the most successful ones that I've run, run in multiple times, different locations, and it's always gonna great turnout. And so whenever you should have this as part of your internal marketing calendar, but I would run this thing twice a year because it's awesome and a lot of women respond to it. It's fun, it's engaging, the community loves it, and I think the marketing emails are hilarious and so kind of even reinforce the culture as you're making money while you do it. So it's an easy play. I would expect somewhere in the neighborhood, it depends on how much, how many people you can service and how many clients you have existing, but I would shoot for about 20% of your clients signing up, your existing EFT, signing up for big booty boot camp, and then you can play with the pricing. Usually it'd be between $150 and $200 for the big booty boot camp. $150 is where we pretty much ran it out, but I'm sure some of you guys, if you're doing owner operated, you're doing a provider of value, you're welcome to do it for hire, but I did it at $150 and it converted really easily there. So yeah, that's the big booty boot camp. I would expect you to just make it quick, easy, 5k cash play, and when you do these every month, then like they add up real fast because all of a sudden you're making an extra 50, 60k a year from clients you already have, and that's actual net income. Okay, so don't don't be enchanted by the top line growth. Look at your net and see what you're actually taking home each month. Hey man, awesome.
